note: WS-6b extension allowlist. The Hypervisor adapter is REQUIRED and its absence fails the browser-host readiness gate. Optional baseline extensions are declared with offline-cache refs; a marketplace timeout marks them degraded (not failed) when a cache/prior install exists. Source-controlled adapter only — never the Ona binary.

required.note: the source-controlled Hypervisor adapter; install rewrites engines.vscode to the runtime in the install copy only
